requirement_summary: Cell balancing shall maintain delta V < 5 mV across all modules
draft_content:
## Test Case TC-015

**Derived from:** REQ-SYS-054
**ASIL:** C

### Objective
Verify that bms shall disconnect hv contactors on crash detection.

### Preconditions
- Vehicle ignition ON
- System under test operational

### Test Steps
1. Establish initial conditions
2. Trigger event described in requirement
3. Measure response time and correctness
4. Record result

### Acceptance Criteria
- Response within specified time bound
- No diagnostic faults triggered
- Traceability link maintained

### References
- ISO 26262-5:2018, clause 7-8.4.1
- Safety goal SG-BA-01
requirement_text:
# REQ-SYS-054: Battery management Safety Requirement

## ASIL Level
C

## Description
BMS shall disconnect HV contactors on crash detection.

## Rationale
ISO 26262-5:2018, clause 7-8.4.1 — safety goal SG-BA-01 requires battery management functional safety.

## Verification Method
Back-to-back test comparing sensor input vs. actuator output.

## Traceability
- Up: REQ-SYS-053 (Battery management Functional Safety Concept)
- Down: TC-SYS-054-SW (Software Integration Test)
